commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the high places of Isaac shall be desolate, and the sanctuaries of Israel shall be laid waste; and I will rise against the house of Jeroboam with the sword. Hebrew, "Isaac. "(Calmet) Septuagint, "laughter. "(Haydock) Isaac had resided for some time at Bersabee, which was a place frequented by idolaters, chap. Josias overthrew (4 Kings xxiii. ; Calmet) the profane "altars. "(Haydock) Sword. His son Zacharias was slain after six months reign, ver.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
